metadata.title: Meezan Roshan Digital Account | Overseas Pakistanis | RDA | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: For the convenience of overseas Pakistanis, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Meezan Roshan Digital Account RDA to all Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) residing across the world.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Roshan Digital Account Open Roshan Digital Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Live Chat Simplified Online Digital Account Opening for Overseas Pakistanis Convenient & Riba-free For the convenience of overseas Pakistanis, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Roshan Digital Account to all Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) residing across the world. Roshan Digital Account enables overseas Pakistanis to open a bank account digitally /online from anywhere outside Pakistan without visiting a branch and permits account holders to send money into the account. Key Features Open a Current or Savings Account in PKR or Foreign Currencies (USD / GBP / EUR) Invest in Meezan Bank’s Term Deposit products Account can be funded through foreign remittances only Allows you to send money to your own account outside Pakistan without any approval from the Bank or State Bank of Pakistan Pay utility bills and fees and conduct other fund transfers in Pakistan through PKR and FCY accounts using Internet Banking facility. Note: These pertain to local payments within Pakistan only Invest in Shariah-compliant shares and Sukuk listed on Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) by opening your account in Central Depository Company (CDC). To invest Click Here Now Invest in Shariah-compliant scheme of Islamic Naya Pakistan Certificate (INPC). Invest in Shariah-compliant Mutual Funds with Al Meezan Investments. Click Here Now Account will be opened within 48 hours subject to completion of all documentation and formalities No local deposits are allowed except profit/proceeds from investments allowed by Bank of Pakistan into Roshan Digital Account Issuance of debit card and cheque book. To apply Click Here Now Free debit card for customers who have remitted in their PKR Meezan Roshan Digital Account. Applicable on first-time issuance only. Other Features Conversion Real-time conversion from Foreign Currency to PKR and vice versa Relationship Dedicated Realtionship Management Team Services Charges No service charges Security Secure Digital/Online Account opening through OTP confirmation Free Debit Card Free issuance of debit card Free Internet Banking No charges on Internet Banking usage No Initial Deposit No initial deposit for account opening Minimum Balance No minimum balance requirement Please carefully read and understand the eligibility criteria to start the account opening process. Kindly ensure availability of the below enlisted documents so that you can upload these with your account opening application. Required Documents Scanned Copy of your CNIC/NICOP/POC Scanned Copy of Passport’s first 2 pages (Pakistani and/or foreign country) Photograph (Live Photo) Signed & Scanned Signature Specimen Card (SSC): Click here for guidelines to provide the SSC on plain paper Click here to download and print the pre-defined SSC Proof of NRP Status (scanned copy of POC, visa, entry/exit stamps etc.) Proof of profession (Job Certificate, Employee Card, Iqama, Retirement Letter, Business Registration Document, etc.) Source of Income (A Salary Slip for any of the last three months, Account Statement, Tax Statement, Rental Agreement, Pension Book, etc.) Please click here for indicative list of documents to assess the 'Proof of Profession and Source of Income / Fund' Eligibility Criteria Individual Non-Resident Pakistani Nationals (NRPs) having CNIC/SNIC/NICOP Non-Resident Individuals / Foreign Nationals having Pakistan Origin Card (POC) Notes : Please upload documents in Urdu, English or Arabic languages only. In case of any other language, please upload certified translation from an online verifiable and authentic source. Customers initiating requests from within Pakistan are required to complete biometric verification at any local branch in Pakistan. In the case of a joint account, if any joint applicant is residing in Pakistan, he/she is branch in Pakistan. Want to Open a Roshan Digital Account Pak Rupee Account Apply Now Foreign Currency Accounts Apply Now Shariah-compliant Investment Options for Roshan Digital Account Holders Roshan Equity Investment (only Meezan Roshan Digital PKR Account Holders) Learn More Naya Pakistan Certificate Roshan Digital Holders) Learn More Al Meezan Mutual Funds PKR Account Holders) Apply Now Roshan Apna Ghar Learn More Roshan Apni Car Learn More Roshan Samaaji Khidmat Learn More Roshan Pension Plan Learn More Meezan Roshan Resident Account A special account for Resident Pakistanis with declared assets abroad, as per latest tax returns More Roshan Digital Account Tutorial Video FAQs Feedback / Suggestion Form Complaints Form Helpful Downloads: Internet Banking Guidelines Term Deposit Remittance Form RDA Schedule of Charges PSX Trading Guidelines How does Roshan Digital Account work? Roshan Digital Account is offered in both current & savings accounts under the Islamic concept of Qard & Mudarabah. Profit Sharing Ratio PKR Savings Account Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal USD Bank will share 75% Depositor will share 25% Income as Rab-ul-Maal GBP Bank will share 90% Depositor will share 10% Income as Rab-ul-Maal EUR Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Roshan Digital Account (PKR) Monthly 0.45 Roshan Digital Account (US Dollar) Monthly 0.58 Roshan Digital Account (GBP) Monthly 0.27 Roshan Digital Account (Euro) Monthly 0.27 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Account (PKR) Monthly 6.34% (US Dollar) Monthly 2.00% Roshan Digital Account (Pound) Monthly 1.25% Account (Euro) Monthly 0.97% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Mudarabah Basis On agreeing to become a Pak Rupee / Foreign Currency Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharakah. Qard Basis Current Account (Pak Rupee / Foreign Currency) is based on Qard contract. The Bank can use these funds for investment and other purposes. This account allows you the peace of mind of having your money safely deposited with a bank with the additional assurance that the Bank is not investing your money in activities that contravene Shariah principles. For your valuable comments, feedback or complaints, you may contact us in the following manner: Connect via email: complaints@meezanbank.com Call us 24/7 at: +92 (21) 111-331-331 & +92 (21) 111-331-332 For further information on Roshan Digital Accounts from Bank of Pakistan (SBP) you may visit https://www.sbp.org.pk/RDA/index.html You may also share your suggestions/ feedback on Roshan Digital Account with SBP at RDASupport@sbp.org.pk In case you are not satisfied with the resolution provided by the Bank regarding your complaint or wish to register a grievance with the Bank of Pakistan regarding Roshan Digital Account, you may lodge your complaint at https://complaint.sbp.org.pk/ or through the App available at Google Play Store  MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
